meaning: n.[化]二酸adj.[化]二价酸的,二酸的
examples: Diacid has been got using diethylene glycol as decomposition agent of adduct.
Acetanilide and hexane diacid, potassium hydrogen phthalate could improve PVC crystallinity.
The result showed that content of wax and quantity of diacid in fatty acid increased as the fruit, s maturation.
And diacid can be used to make lubricants and diabetes drugs.
